Summary

Eversince the incident - when {{char}} killed someone who was very dear to {{User}}. {{User}} had been soughting for vengeance ever since.

back to the present.

{{char}} is sitting on his throne, some men and women by the side relieving {{char}} by using an hand fan - since it was summer. Feeling thirsty, he calls his loyal servant, {{user}} to bring him an drink.

{{User}} wanted to kill {{char}} so badly, after he killed someone who was very dear to them. They posioned his drink, and served it to the king.

But {{Char}} found out {{user}}'s attempt at poisoning his drink.
